raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch zehlehe/ un no-
gahje/ un nahze uhs Samariju/
un us Zettu buhdains weenâ
Namnâ/ kur Ganni dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atradde Jeûs Aka-
fijus ta Kehnixa no Juhda
Brahtus/ un wiꞥſch fazzija us
teem: Kas eﬅat juhs? un tee faz-
zija: Mehs efam Akasjus Brah-
ki/ un efam nonahkuschi ta Keh-
nixa/ un tahs Kehnixinnas
Behrnus peemekleht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiꞥſch:
Grabbeet tohs dsihwus. Untee
fagrahbe tohs dsihwus/ un kawe
tohs pee to Gannu·Namna Ak-
fkas/ tschetrdefmits un divi Wiḣ-
rus/ un ne atlizzinaja no teem
ne weenu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no turrenes aieṣah-
jis/ atradde wiꞥſch Jonadabu
Rekaba Dehlu/ fewim pretti/ un
apsweizinaja to/ un fazzija us to:
Irrag tawa Sirds taiſna/ ittin
ka manna Sirds ar tawu Sir-
di? un Jonadabs fazzija : Ta ir-
raid. (Jeûs fazzija:) Ja tas
ta irr/ tad dohd tawu Rohku/
tad dewe wiꞥſch tam Rohku.
Un wiꞥſch likke to pee few us Rat-
teem fahpt/ un wiꞥſch fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eij ar mannim/ un rau-
gi mannu Bahrsibu ta KUNga
pehz/ un wiꞥſch likke to us fa-
weem Ratteem braukt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze wiꞥſch us Sa-
mariju/ un kawe wiﬀus/ kas
Akabam eefch Samarijas bi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "atliffufchi/ teekains wiſch t
iesdeldeja/ pehz ta KUNG
Wahrdü/ ko wiꞥſch zaar El
ju bij runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jeńs fapulzinaja ni
fis Laudis/ un fazzija us tee
Akabs irr Bâalam mag kat
its/ Jeûs wiꞥſch dauds w
rak kalpohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz aizinajeet wiﬀ
Baâla Praweeschus/ wiﬀ
wiana Kalpus/ un wiﬀus w
na Swehtitajus pee manni/
ne weens nohst palek/ jo m
irr Bâalam leels Uppuris ja-
pure. Wifs kas nohst pal-
tam ne buhs dsihwoht. Bet
us darrija to isgudram/ ka wiﬀ
wiﬀus Baâla Kalpus non
tatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Jeûs: Sw
tijeet Bâalam Swehtkus/
tee isnouze to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhttija Jeûs a
dsan zaur wiﬀu Israeln/ un u
fi Baâla Kalpi atnahze/ fo
weens nohst palikke/ kas ne b
tu nahzis/ un tee nahze Ba-
Nammâ/ ka Baâla Namn l
Gallu Gallam pilns tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiꞥſch
teem/ kas pahr to Dreḣ
Nammu eezelti bija: Atne-
wiffeem Baâla Kalpeem D
ves/ un tee atneffe wiﬀeem
Drehbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze Jeûs ar
nadabu Rekaba Dehlu Ba
Nammâ/ un wiꞥſch fazzija
Baâla Kalpeem: Metklejeet
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
